Home/Mirakl Repricer

Mirakl Repricer / Europe

A pricing agent with boundaries, not a black box

Autopricy is a rule-based Mirakl repricer for selected European marketplace channels. It uses available competitor signals, minimum and maximum prices, and channel-specific rules to automate offer updates while keeping submission, confirmation, protection, and failure states visible.

Check your channelSee the workflow
M.MARKETPLACE
NETWORK
Repricing control loopExplainable rules
  • Observe
    Available offers and prices    Channel data
  • Constrain
    Minimum and maximum price    Hard limits
  • Act
    Submit eligible updates    Automated
  • Verify
    Track platform response    Auditable

European Repricing Tool

One marketplace model, different channel realities

Mirakl powers many marketplace operations, but each operator exposes different data, limits, and workflows. Autopricy assesses support per channel instead of claiming that one generic connector behaves identically everywhere.

01 / DATA

Signals vary by channel

Competitor visibility, offer fields, update frequency, and confirmation behavior depend on the marketplace operator.

02 / CONTROL

Price safety comes first

Every eligible action stays inside the seller-defined minimum and maximum price range.

03 / STATE

Submission is not confirmation

A request can be accepted, delayed, limited, or rejected. Those states should remain distinct in operations.

AI agent language, rule-based pricing decisions

Autopricy behaves like a pricing agent because it continuously observes, decides, acts, and verifies. Today, its core repricing decisions are driven by explicit business rules—not generative AI choosing prices on its own. This keeps margins, platform constraints, and operational accountability visible.

Integration Workflow

Validate one channel before scaling across Europe

Identify the operator

Share the marketplace, country, store count, SKU volume, and current repricing process.

Confirm API capability

We check available offer data, update operations, rate limits, and authorization requirements.

Audit offer data

Sync a controlled scope and verify identifiers, current prices, boundaries, and competitor signals.

Enable and observe

Start with clear rules, review execution states, then expand only after results are confirmed.

中文说明

Mirakl 自动调价不是一个“全平台通用”开关

不同 Mirakl 系平台开放的竞争数据、Offer 字段、执行频率和接口限制并不相同。Autopricy 会先评估具体平台和店铺，再决定可以启用哪些自动调价、批量管理与状态追踪能力。

平台评估

先确认接口能力

明确平台、国家站点、店铺规模和所需操作，避免把 Mirakl 生态误解为完全一致的接口。

价格边界

最低价与最高价保护

所有符合条件的价格计算都必须留在卖家设置的安全范围内。

执行记录

提交、确认与失败分开

让运营知道价格请求处于哪个阶段，以及什么时候需要人工处理。

FAQ

Mirakl repricer questions

Does Autopricy support every Mirakl-powered marketplace?

No. Capabilities are assessed per operator because APIs, data visibility, rate limits, and permitted actions differ between channels.

Is this an AI-powered repricer?

The workflow is agent-like, but core repricing decisions currently use explicit rules and price boundaries rather than generative AI autonomously choosing prices.

Can it reprice below my minimum?

No. Eligible price changes are constrained by the minimum and maximum values configured for the offer.

Does a lower price guarantee the Buy Box?

No. Price can influence marketplace competition, but inventory, fulfillment, seller performance, and operator rules can also affect the outcome.

Check your Mirakl marketplace channel

Send the operator, country, store count, SKU volume, and current workflow. We will confirm the practical integration scope first.
